name: Flipt v2
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential pkg-config && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && sudo mkdir -p /home/vscode/.local/state/mise && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.local/share/mise /home/vscode/.local/state/mise /home/vscode/go/pkg /home/vscode/.cache/go-build && mise settings set node.gpg_verify false && mise trust --yes . && mise install && mise run bootstrap && mise run ui:deps'
